name: skynex-pi
description_en: Multi-agent coding harness for Pi — triage + 17 skills + 11 sub-agents + 11 extensions. Full medium/substantial-path workflow with HITL gates, TDD enforcement, adversarial review, research mode, task-creation mode, and execution mode.
description_zh: Pi 的多代理编码工具 — 分诊 + 17 个技能 + 11 个子代理 + 11 个扩展。完整的中等/实质性路径工作流程，带有 HITL 门、TDD 执行、对抗性审查、研究模式、任务创建模式和执行模式
